design_philosophy: The 'Living Dictionary'. Evenda must feel like a premium cultural artifact, blending the scholarly authority of an encyclopedia with the rich, earthy aesthetics of Venda heritage. We avoid sterile tech-layouts and replace them with editorial elegance, generous whitespace, and subtle nods to traditional Venda beadwork colors (minwenda) applied as functional UI accents.

usage_rules.headings: Use Cormorant Garamond for all H1, H2, and H3. Never make them bold; use font-light or font-medium for elegance.
usage_rules.body: Use Work Sans for readability. Keep line-height generous (leading-relaxed) for dictionary definitions.
usage_rules.category_tags: Use Work Sans, uppercase, extra-small, with wide tracking.

grid_system.search_results: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8

spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Flat solid surfaces. No heavy shadows. Use 1px delicate borders (border-[#E3DFD5]) to separate content. Cards should have rounded-xl or rounded-2xl corners with minimal padding (p-6 to p-8).

navigation.style: Glassmorphism over hero images, or solid #FDFBF7 when scrolling.
navigation.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#E3DFD5]

search_bar.classes: w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto h-16 md:h-20 text-lg md:text-xl rounded-full border-2 border-[#E3DFD5] bg-white px-8 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D66D45] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#D66D45]/20 transition-all shadow-sm

entry_card.classes: flex flex-col p-6 lg:p-8 bg-white border border-[#E3DFD5] rounded-2xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:border-[#D66D45]/30 group cursor-pointer

category_badge.style: Subtle pill-shape using Venda beadwork inspired colors but low opacity background.
category_badge.classes: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase

buttons.primary: bg-[#D66D45] text-white hover:bg-[#C25D36] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#2B2927] border border-[#E3DFD5] hover:border-[#2B2927] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.audio: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#F3EFE6] text-[#D66D45] hover:bg-[#D66D45] hover:text-white transition-colors

inputs.default: w-full h-12 px-4 rounded-lg border border-[#E3DFD5] bg-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D66D45] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D66D45]/20 transition-colors

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and gain a soft shadow. Buttons smoothly shift background colors.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade-in with a slight upward translation (framer-motion).
motion_and_interactions.staggered_lists: Search results should stagger in on load (0.1s delay between cards).

hero_background.description: Serene sunset over a field with majestic baobab trees, representing natural roots and heritage.
hero_background.usage: Use as a large hero background on the homepage, with a dark or gradient overlay (bg-black/40) to ensure the white Evenda typography and search bar pop perfectly.

culture_placeholder_1.description: A woman with a headpiece made of beads.
culture_placeholder_1.usage: Use this as a placeholder image for 'People', 'Customs', or 'Folklore' entry cards on the search results or entry detail page.

culture_placeholder_2.description: A woman in a yellow skirt dancing, representing Venda culture.
culture_placeholder_2.usage: Alternative placeholder image for cultural entries.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #2B2927 text meets APCA guidelines against #FDFBF7 background.
accessibility.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='search-input', data-testid='category-filter-words', data-testid='entry-card-title').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI focusing on typography and generous spacing.
The homepage should have a massive, beautiful search input over the Baobab hero image.
Implement a Category filter bar below the search on the results page using the specific 'category_accents' colors as active states.
Use Shadcn UI for complex forms (contribute page, login/signup), but style them minimally without default Vercel/Stripe 'card' styles. Use flat borders and rounded-xl containers.
On the Entry Details page, create a beautiful, editorial typographic hierarchy. Huge Garamond heading, with pronunciation text in JetBrains Mono.
Use lucide-react for UI icons (volume for audio, search, user, plus for contribute).
